name: Deep Chocolate Cupcakes WW
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a muffin tin with paper liners (12 cups).
3. In a food processor, puree the prunes and 1/2 cup water until smooth. Scrape the puree into a large bowl.
4. Beat together the prune puree and water with an electric mixer.
5. Add egg whites and vanilla; beat until thoroughly combined.
6. Stir in remaining ingredients; mix completely.
7. Spoon batter evenly into prepared cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out clean.
9. Remove from pan and cool on a rack.
10. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
Weight Watcher Exchanges: 1/2 Bread, 80 Optional Calories.
